title: Picraena amara

The health benefits of Picraena amara include its potential to aid in digestion, relieve fever, and reduce inflammation, making it a traditional remedy for various health issues. In traditional herbal medicine, Picraena amara is commonly prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, often used to treat digestive disorders and fever.
